nasb.text: He is your praise and He is your God, who has done these great and awesome things for you which your eyes have seen.

esv.text: He is your praise. He is your God, who has done for you these great and terrifying things that your eyes have seen.

cnv.text: 他是你當頌讚的；他是你的　神，他為你作了那些大而可畏的事，就是你親眼見過的。

ccb.text: 你们要赞美祂，祂是你们的上帝，你们亲眼目睹了祂为你们做的伟大而可畏的事。
